activities_projects.title: Phases of the Moon Observation
activities_projects.objective: Observe and record the changing phases of the Moon
steps: Observe the Moon each night for 15 days
Draw the shape of the Moon you see
Record the date for each observation
Identify the pattern of phases
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the sequence of lunar phases

activities_projects.title: Sun Shadow Time Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the Sun's position changes during the day
steps: Place a stick vertically in the ground
Mark the tip of the shadow every hour
Observe how the shadow changes direction and length
Record the results
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how the Sun’s position helps measure time

activities_projects.title: Simple Sundial Model
activities_projects.objective: Understand ancient methods of time measurement
steps: Insert a stick vertically into cardboard
Mark shadow positions at different times
Label time markings around the stick
Use it to estimate time during the day
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the working of a sundial

activities_projects.title: Constellation Identification
activities_projects.objective: Learn to identify constellations in the night sky
steps: Observe the night sky on a clear evening
Locate common constellations like Orion or Ursa Major
Draw their patterns in your notebook
Label the stars

activities_projects.title: Day and Night Demonstration
activities_projects.objective: Understand how Earth’s rotation causes day and night
steps: Place the globe in a dark room
Shine a torch representing the Sun
Rotate the globe slowly
Observe how different areas receive light
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands how Earth's rotation causes day and night

activities_projects.title: Calendar Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Understand how lunar cycles influence calendars
steps: Identify full moon and new moon dates in a calendar
Calculate the gap between them
Record observations
Discuss how lunar cycles influence calendars
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the connection between lunar phases and calendars

activities_projects.title: Star Movement Observation
activities_projects.objective: Observe apparent movement of stars in the sky
steps: Observe a group of stars at night
Note their position relative to a landmark
Observe again after one hour
Record changes in position
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns that stars appear to move due to Earth’s rotation

activities_projects.title: Moon Phase Model
activities_projects.objective: Demonstrate lunar phases using a model
steps: Hold the ball representing the Moon
Use the torch as the Sun
Move around the torch slowly
Observe the illuminated portion of the ball

activities_projects.title: Earth Rotation Experiment
steps: Mark a location on the globe
Rotate the globe slowly
Observe how the marked point moves
Relate this motion to day-night cycle

activities_projects.title: Sky Observation Diary
activities_projects.objective: Encourage regular observation of the night sky
steps: Observe the sky for 7 days
Record visible stars, moon phase, and weather conditions
Note any changes observed
Summarize findings
